basic_details.job_title: HLL Lifecare Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Operations Manager, Associate Manager and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: HLL Lifecare (Mini Ratna Central Public Sector Enterprise)
basic_details.short_information: HLL Lifecare is recruiting experienced professionals for senior regulatory and quality assurance roles on contract basis.

qualification.details: For Senior Operations Manager: | Qualification: Graduation in MLT / Medical Microbiology / Medical Biochemistry / Medical Biotechnology / Medical Immunology or BE/B.Tech in Biomedical Engineering Experience: Minimum 6 years in QA/QC of clinical diagnostic laboratories including ISO 15189 / NABL accreditation Age Limit: Maximum 45 years as on 01.07.2026 | For Operations Manager / Associate Manager (Regulatory Affairs): | Qualification: B.Pharm or Graduation in Biomedical Sciences Experience: Operations Manager - Minimum 3 years; Associate Manager - Minimum 1 year in regulatory affairs, product registration, dossier preparation Age Limit: Operations Manager: 40 years; Associate Manager: 37 years (as on 01.07.2026)

vacancy_details.details: Senior Operations Manager (Corporate Quality Assurance) - 01 Post Operations Manager / Associate Manager (Regulatory Affairs & Product Registration) - 01 Post

salary_details.details: Senior Operations Manager: | Basic Pay: Rs. 35,000 - 65,000/- Gross Salary: Rs. 70,385/- (Metro) approx. Annual CTC: Rs. 9.99 Lakhs (Metro) approx. | Operations Manager: | Basic Pay: Rs. 30,000 - 50,000/- Gross Salary: Rs. 60,330/- (Metro) approx. Annual CTC: Rs. 8.61 Lakhs (Metro) approx. | Associate Manager: | Basic Pay: Rs. 25,000 - 45,000/- Gross Salary: Rs. 50,275/- (Metro) approx. Annual CTC: Rs. 7.22 Lakhs (Metro) approx.

how_to_apply: Access the Google Form link provided in the official advertisement.
Download the prescribed application form from the HLL website or Google Form link.
Fill the form digitally and save as PDF/Word (handwritten not accepted).
Upload the completed form and supporting documents (max 10 MB per file).
important_instructions: Applications must be in the prescribed format only. SC/ST/OBC/PwD candidates eligible for relaxation as per GoI rules. Candidates from Govt/PSUs must submit NOC at interview. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. HLL reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment at any stage.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download Senior Operations Manager Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: HLL Lifecare Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: HLL Lifecare has invited applications for the following positions in the Corporate Quality Assurance Department: Download Senior Operations Manager Notification PDF Download Operations Manager / Associate Manager Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: HLL Lifecare Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: HLL Lifecare is recruiting experienced professionals for senior regulatory and quality assurance roles on contract basis.

content_sections.heading: HLL Lifecare Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: Senior Operations Manager (Corporate Quality Assurance) - 01 Post Operations Manager / Associate Manager (Regulatory Affairs & Product Registration) - 01 Post

content_sections.heading: HLL Lifecare Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: For Senior Operations Manager: Qualification: Graduation in MLT / Medical Microbiology / Medical Biochemistry / Medical Biotechnology / Medical Immunology or BE/B.Tech in Biomedical Engineering Experience: Minimum 6 years in QA/QC of clinical diagnostic laboratories including ISO 15189 / NABL accreditation Age Limit: Maximum 45 years as on 01.07.2026 For Operations Manager / Associate Manager (Regulatory Affairs): Qualification: B.Pharm or Graduation in Biomedical Sciences Experience: Operations Manager - Minimum 3 years; Associate Manager - Minimum 1 year in regulatory affairs, product registration, dossier preparation Age Limit: Operations Manager: 40 years; Associate Manager: 37 years (as on 01.07.2026)

content_sections.heading: HLL Lifecare Recruitment 2026 Pay Scale & Remuneration
content_sections.text: Senior Operations Manager: Basic Pay: Rs. 35,000 - 65,000/- Gross Salary: Rs. 70,385/- (Metro) approx. Annual CTC: Rs. 9.99 Lakhs (Metro) approx. Operations Manager: Basic Pay: Rs. 30,000 - 50,000/- Gross Salary: Rs. 60,330/- (Metro) approx. Annual CTC: Rs. 8.61 Lakhs (Metro) approx. Associate Manager: Basic Pay: Rs. 25,000 - 45,000/- Gross Salary: Rs. 50,275/- (Metro) approx. Annual CTC: Rs. 7.22 Lakhs (Metro) approx.

content_sections.heading: HLL Lifecare Recruitment 2026 Key Job Responsibilities
content_sections.text: Senior Operations Manager: Oversee ISO 15189 compliant QMS implementation and NABL accreditation Manage internal audits, CAPA, risk management, and quality reviews Provide technical guidance for laboratory quality assurance Operations Manager / Associate Manager: Manage regulatory approvals and product registrations (domestic & international) Prepare technical dossiers and coordinate with CDSCO & international agencies Support new product development and market expansion

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for HLL Lifecare Recruitment 2026
Important Instructions for HLL Lifecare Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Applications must be in the prescribed format only. SC/ST/OBC/PwD candidates eligible for relaxation as per GoI rules. Candidates from Govt/PSUs must submit NOC at interview. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. HLL reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment at any stage.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for HLL Lifecare Senior Operations Manager and Regulatory Affairs posts 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online submission is 22 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are announced by HLL Lifecare Limited?
faq.answer: Total 02 vacancies — one for Senior Operations Manager and one for Operations/Associate Manager (Regulatory Affairs).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Senior Operations Manager at HLL Lifecare?
faq.answer: Gross Salary approx. Rs. 70,385/- per month with Annual CTC of Rs. 9.99 Lakhs (Metro).

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for these HLL Lifecare positions?
faq.answer: Graduation in relevant fields such as B.Pharm, Biomedical Sciences, MLT, Medical Microbiology, or Biomedical Engineering.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for Senior Operations Manager post?
faq.answer: Maximum 45 years as on 01.07.2026.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for HLL Lifecare Limited Quality Assurance and Regulatory Affairs jobs?
faq.answer: Apply through the Google Form by uploading the digitally filled application form and documents.

faq.question: Q7. Is experience in NABL accreditation required?
faq.answer: Yes, for Senior Operations Manager – minimum 6 years including ISO 15189 / NABL experience.

faq.question: Q8. What is the contract duration for these positions?
faq.answer: Fixed Term Contract basis (duration as per advertisement).

faq.question: Q9. Where is the posting location for selected candidates?
faq.answer: Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala.

faq.question: Q10. Are SC/ST/OBC candidates eligible for relaxation?
faq.answer: Yes, relaxation as per Government of India directives.
